title: DeepSeek node connection failure after update
symptom: After updating to n8n v2.12.3, the DeepSeek node fails to authenticate or connect, while it works in v2.2.6.
not_this_if: DeepSeek node works in older versions
root_cause: The issue arises from a conflict between the official DeepSeek node and any community versions that may have been installed. This conflict can prevent proper authentication and connection to the DeepSeek service in the latest n8n version.
fix_steps: If the issue persists, revoke existing credentials and create new ones
Alternatively, consider using an HTTP node or an inference provider like Groq or Openrouter.
agent_instruction: Uninstall community DeepSeek nodes and restart n8n to resolve the connection issue.
